Off Calendar May-17-2024 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-07-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar May-17-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. ANDREW AHEARN, Esq. of Reese Law Group (tel: 760-842-5850) for Plaintiff.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS.

Matter discussed. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The Motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is denied without prejudice for insufficient compliance with CCP section 439 (meet and confer).

Judge: Rochelle C. East; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RCE)

Andrew Ahearn, Esq. Reese Law Group 760-842-5850 Attorney for Plaintiff: Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.

PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLANTIFF AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. Discussed, not ARGUED: The Court rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Non-Appearance is granted. Plaintiff's counsel is to prepare and submit a proposed order to Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane by email at rkane1089@aol.com.
